signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: We are gaining share from the better furniture base national brands... while the worst housing market in almost fifty years continues to suppress transaction volumes across the category.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We talked about reduction in capital spending last call... there's building blocks to maintain positive cash flow going forward.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We've taken a lot of price increases this year... the customer is gonna have to conform. Things cost more. That's what happens.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: Not a time to underestimate risk... there could be a whole new round of tariffs... it's gonna be predictably unpredictable.
